summary: Authored P1 deliverable SPEC_TRACKING.md as a per-FR tracking matrix covering all 8 pre-defined FRs (FR-01..FR-08) with DRAFT status, unassigned owner, PENDING acceptance state, and line-precise citations to both SPEC.md (authoritative) and SRS.md §3 (P1 deliverable); included coverage statistics, 10 open questions, and a v1.0 change-log entry dated 2026-06-03 under harness-methodology v2.7.0.
